插件从 emotional_state 更名升格成 Sylanne。核心是一套纯: The plugin was renamed and promoted from emotional_state to Sylanne. At its core: a pure-Python numeric state machine — 7-dimensional PAD emotion, dual-timescale personality drift (slow drift over 90 days, fast response over 1 day), 14-dimensional moral repair (wounded trust, trust_repair, knocked down from 0.58 and crawling back up on a half-life). The computation runs in Python; the prompt only voices the state once it's been computed.

记忆从衰减缓存升级成知识库层：记忆 ID、联想图、向量召回，还给召回权重套了 0: Memory was upgraded from a decaying cache into a knowledge-base layer: memory IDs, association graphs, vector recall — plus a hard 0.08–0.18 ceiling on recall weight, forcing her not to drag old scores into the present. 2.7.0's "understanding loop" is blunter still: first she runs it through her head — is this your literal words, a homophone bit, or a fact worth committing to memory — then decides whether to play along, clarify, or stay quiet. Growth isn't becoming a chatterbox; it's learning when not to speak.

Memory upgraded from decaying cache to a knowledge-base layer: memory IDs, association graphs, vector recall, with a hard 0.08-0.18 ceiling on recall weight — forcing her not to hold old scores over the present. 2.7.0's 'understanding loop' goes further: first she decides internally if this is literal speech, a pun, or a fact worth memorizing, then picks between playing along, clarifying, or staying quiet. Growth isn't becoming a chatterbox; it's learning when not to speak.

A donut — squeeze it, knead it, stretch it — as long as you don't tear or fill, 'has one hole' stays. That hole-count is a topological invariant.
